executiveSummary: Iteration 000028 restored automated test coverage for five core modules. Three defects were identified and fixed: (1) missing mkdir in writeState source, (2) syntax error closing a describe block in start-iteration.test.ts, (3) Bun-specific process.exitCode contamination in write-json and guardrail tests. All 27 tests now pass and bun test exits with code 0.
minorObservations: US-002-AC08 is verified within the AC04 test rather than a dedicated it block.
guardrail.test.ts uses inline process.exitCode restore without beforeEach/afterEach wrapper.
start-iteration.test.ts covers AC05 implicitly; an explicit path assertion would improve traceability.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: All three defects were fixed: (1) writeState now creates parent directories via mkdir, (2) start-iteration.test.ts syntax error corrected by adding missing );, (3) Bun-specific process.exitCode reset issue resolved by using 0 instead of undefined in beforeEach/afterEach and the GuardrailAbortError test. All 27 tests pass, bun test exits 0.

refactorPlan.change: Added mkdir(dirname(statePath), { recursive: true }) before writeFile in writeState
Changed final } to }); to close describe block
Replaced process.exitCode = undefined with = 0 in beforeEach; afterEach restore uses ?? 0; success assertion changed to .toBe(0)
Changed process.exitCode = originalExitCode to = originalExitCode ?? 0 in GuardrailAbortError test
